overrides._comment: SYMBOL OVERRIDE MAPPING: Maps CDSL demat ticker name → actual NSE/BSE trading code. Use when: (1) portfolio ticker differs from NSE code, (2) company merged/delisted (map to new code), (3) BSE-only listing. Format: 'DEMAT_TICKER': 'YAHOO_CODE' where YAHOO_CODE is 'SYMBOL.NS' (NSE) or 'SYMBOL.BO' (BSE). To find correct code: search 'COMPANY_NAME NSE ticker' or check nseindia.com/get-quotes. Test with: curl 'https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v10/finance/quoteSummary/YAHOO_CODE?modules=price' (should return data, not 404). Examples: ZINKA→BLACKBUCK.NS (name changed), HDFC→HDFCBANK.NS (merged), TITANBIO→TITANBIO.BO (BSE only).

isin_map._comment: ISIN → NSE Trading Code mapping. When demat ticker name differs from actual NSE trading symbol, map ISIN to correct code here. Example: IN0020230184 → SGBFEB32IV means that gold bond with this ISIN trades as SGBFEB32IV.NS on NSE. Format: 'ISIN': 'TRADING_CODE'
